summary: Added preliminary mark-scheme front-matter detection so numbered notes and marking-principles text are not treated as legacy question anchors.
test_results: Focused loop verification passed in the final session: 111 focused tests passed and 12 rendering-marker tests passed.
acceptance_criteria_status: Satisfied: specific marking principles pages are ignored.
Satisfied: numbered notes before a same-page answer table are ignored while real answer rows remain detectable.
repo_hygiene_notes: No generated outputs or canonical inputs were changed.
known_risks: The front-matter marker list may need expansion if future papers use different headings.
implementation_summary: Added _legacy_answer_table_header_y to detect split Question / Answer / Marks table headers.
Returned None from _legacy_question_anchor_number for numbered notes before the answer header.
Added three regression tests covering notes-only pages, specific marking principles pages, and same-page notes before the answer table.
behavior_change: Legacy mark-scheme anchor detection now distinguishes numbered front-matter notes from real answer-table question rows.
scope_control: No filename-specific handling or generated output changes were introduced.
